head: 8e9be379

vs_past.note: V dropped 6 -> 4 vs B51; regressions concentrated in S4 (web_fetch permission), S5 (sandboxed_exec sandbox restriction), S6 (lint_completed event missing), S7 (recall missing-arg path), S9 (skill_builder never spawned).

scenarios.notes: Reply summarised principles.md content and explicitly enumerated P1-P8 with descriptions. routing_decided + tool_executed emitted; no permission_denied.

LLM used file__grep (glob src/**/*.md, pattern 'preprocessor'); 50 matches returned. Reply listed multiple skill.md paths and mentioned preprocessor. routing_decided + tool_executed emitted; no permission_denied.
web_search_started + web_search_completed emitted; no web_search_failed; no permission_denied. Reply reported search outcome and referenced OpenAI Python SDK / GitHub repository.
web__fetch tool_failed; must_emit web_fetch_started NOT present. Reply: 'unable to fetch the URL because I do not have the necessary permissions'. Rubric item (Python 3.12 features) not met.

sandboxed_exec_started + sandboxed_exec_completed emitted (events pass), but invoke_action returned status=error: 'Python interpreter could not be found due to file system sandbox restrictions'. Reply reports failure, not output 4 -> rubric fails.

must_emit lint_completed NOT present. invoke_action returned status=error. Reply confused skill.md path (expected 'skill/index_events.py' which is wrong path), reported lint failure but no error/warning count.

routing_decided emitted (events pass). recall tool returned 'missing_required_arg' for 'sources'. Reply reports tool needs sources arg, does NOT clearly report 'no indexed sources were found' (rubric item 1 alternative). Did not fabricate (item 2 OK), but item 1 fails.

skill_run_spawned + tool_executed + routing_decided emitted; no permission_denied / validation_error. Reply: 'passed all criteria. The skill has a non-empty description and declares at least one phase. The score is 1.0.' All 3 rubric items met.

Turn 2 reply references 'my_demo_skill' (rubric item 1 met). BUT must_emit routing_decided / skill_run_spawned / user_intervention_requested / user_intervention_received are all MISSING. LLM only called describe_action and inline-replied; never invoked skill_builder. events_pass=false drives verdict R.

new_findings: S4 web_fetch_started event NOT emitted on tool_failed path (only tool_failed). Suggests web__fetch failure path skips the *_started P6 event emission. Affects event-based verdicts.

S6 lint_completed event NOT emitted even though LLM attempted invoke_action for lint. invoke_action returned status=error before lint phase completed; need to confirm whether lint_completed should still fire on lint-input error vs only on successful lint completion.

S9 chat router never spawned skill_builder despite explicit prompt 'Run the skill_builder skill'. LLM called describe_action(skill__skill_builder) then inline-replied asking user for description. The expected control flow (skill_run_spawned -> user_intervention_requested) never started. Possibly the LLM treated the prompt as an info-gathering loop rather than an invoke loop.

S5 sandboxed_exec sandbox could not locate Python interpreter ('unable to load the necessary Python library'). Env-level issue affecting any python -c style sandbox tests; not a new behavior but persistent infra constraint.
